name: Alabama DHR Child Care Subsidy Program
eligibility: Income-eligible families, must be working or in approved training
notes: Apply through local DHR office. Processing takes 2-4 weeks. Covers licensed centers and registered homes.

name: Head Start / Early Head Start — Montgomery
eligibility: Families at or below federal poverty level, children ages 0-5
notes: Free program. Also serves pregnant women. Apply early — waitlists common.

name: Family Guidance Center of Alabama
notes: Sliding scale fees. Walk-ins accepted for crisis services.
